sql: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE status = #{status} AND department_id IN (#{deptIds})
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email FROM users
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="deptId" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{deptId}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
